prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第52名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强。\ n2023年声誉周期内曾出现偏负面事件（学校管理相关），但此后无持续负面舆情；抖音热度排名第71位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录。\ n食品科学与工程A+、轻工技术与工程A+，均为全国顶尖水平；与招生专业中的食品科学与工程、食品质量与安全、生物工程、酿酒工程等直接对应，王牌专业吸 引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，江南大学在上述领域均有招生；生化环材大类整体劝退，但该校食品学科 为A+王牌，热度独立于大类；本省物理类考生2021年16.6万→2025年26.1万，持续大幅增长，2026年预计超30万，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2021年417→2025年463，稳中有升， 反映整体竞争强度上升；江南大学位于江苏省无锡市，为本省高校，在本省招生规模大（物理类约700–800人），本地考生报考意愿较强，无跨省地域偏好劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次31362名、2026年扩招约11.1%（位次数字增大方向）、本省物理类考生持续大幅增长（竞争加剧）、学校软科排名稳步提升（吸引力增强 ）等因素，扩招对位次的推后效应被考生增长和学校层次提升部分抵消，预计2026年最低位次约33650名，区间33150–34150名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 25631 → 32307 → 31865 → 32341 → 31362. After 2021, the overall ranking shifted backward by about 5700 places, stabilizing in the 31,000–32,000 range in the last three years, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 31362.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 683 in 2021, 712 in 2022, 704 in 2023, 694 in 2024, and 712 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 791, an increase of about 79 students (+11.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition.\ nIn the 2023 reputation cycle, there was a negative incident (related to school management), but no sustained negative public opinion since; its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderate short video exposure; no significant enrollment gaps recorded.\ nFood Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are both top-tier nationally, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Bioengineering, and Brewing Engineering, making these flagship programs highly attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Hot majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering maintain high social popularity, and Jiangnan University enrolls in these fields; the broader category of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials is generally discouraged, but the university's Food Science discipline is an A+ flagship, with popularity independent of the broader category; the number of provincial Physics Category examinees grew from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, a sustained significant increase, with 2026 expected to exceed 300,000, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, steadily increasing, reflecting rising overall competition intensity; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province, a local university with a large enrollment scale in the province (about 700–800 in Physics Category), and local examinees have a strong willingness to apply, with no cross-provincial regional preference disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31362, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 11.1% (ranking number increases), the continued significant growth of provincial Physics Category examinees (intensified competition), and the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhanced attractiveness), the expansion's effect of pushing the ranking backward is partially offset by examinee growth and the university's improved standing. The 2026 minimum ranking is expected to be approximately 33650, with a range of 33150–34150.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 33650, range 33150–34150. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<33150), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine Outstanding Class, Food AI Outstanding Class); if ranking is near the upper limit (>34150), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as safety. Jiangnan University's Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are national top-tier disciplines, and related majors deserve special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated approximately from 5234 → 5832 → 5381 → 6398 → 6031, overall within the 5200–6400 range, with a fluctuation of about 1000 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 6031. In-province History Category enrollment: 178 in 2021, 191 in 2022, 170 in 2023, 195 in 2024, 170 in 2025; 2026 plan is 174, an increase of 4 (+2.4%) compared to 2025, a very small expansion with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking rose from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, steadily improving in recent years, enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative reputation event (related to university management), but no sustained negative public opinion since. Douyin popularity ranking 71st (average), moderate short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps recorded. Food Science and Engineering A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, though mainly science and engineering disciplines, as a 211 comprehensive university, it still has brand appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Accounting/Finance/Audit are recommended, all popular liberal arts directions. Jiangnan University's History Category enrollment covers these majors. In-province History Category candidates: 95,000 in 2021 → 97,000 in 2025, basically stable, estimated over 100,000 in 2026, slight increase. Provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 476 in 2021 to 482 in 2025, steadily increasing. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province, a local university with in-province History Category enrollment of about 170–195, strong willingness among local candidates, no cross-province regional preference disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6031, 2026 enrollment expansion of about 2.4% (minimal impact), basically stable in-province History Category candidates, continuously improving Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), positive popularity of liberal arts popular majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature), the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 6066, with a range of 5566–6566.
